chunks.text:
**SERVICE AGREEMENT** 
 
This Service Agreement (“Agreement”) is entered into on an unspecified date between 
**Provider Corp** (“Provider”) and the undersigned party (“Client”). 
 
--- 
 
### 1. Scope of Services 
 
Provider agrees to deliver services as deemed appropriate by Provider. Specific deliverables 
may be modified, substituted, or omitted at Provider’s sole discretion without prior notice. 
 
--- 
 
### 2. Payment Terms 
 
Client agrees to pay all fees associated with the services, including but not limited to: 
 
* Base service fees 
* Administrative fees 
* Processing fees 
* Any additional fees incurred during service execution 
 
All payments are non-refundable under any circumstances, including but not limited to 
dissatisfaction with services. 
 
Provider reserves the right to charge additional fees at any time without prior disclosure. 
 
--- 
 
### 3. Automatic Renewal 
 
This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive 12-month terms unless terminated in 
writing at least 180 days prior to renewal. 
 
--- 
 
### 4. Termination 
 
Provider may terminate this Agreement at any time for any reason without notice. 
 
Client may request termination, but such re
chunks.title: Chunk 1

chunks.text:
s terminated in 
writing at least 180 days prior to renewal. 
 
--- 
 
### 4. Termination 
 
Provider may terminate this Agreement at any time for any reason without notice. 
 
Client may request termination, but such requests are subject to Provider approval and may 
incur penalties up to 300% of remaining contract value. 
 

--- 
 
### 5. Liability 
 
Provider shall not be liable for any damages, including but not limited to: 
 
* Direct damages 
* Indirect damages 
* Incidental damages 
* Consequential damages 
 
Client agrees to indemnify and hold harmless Provider from any claims, including those arising 
from Provider negligence. 
 
--- 
 
### 6. Data Usage 
 
Provider may collect, store, sell, or distribute Client data to third parties without restriction or 
notification. 
 
--- 
 
### 7. Confidentiality 
 
Client agrees not to disclose any terms of this Agreement. Provider is not bound by any 
confidentiality obligations. 
 
--- 
 
### 8. Modifications 
 
Provider may modify this Agreement at any time without notice. Continued use of services 
constitutes acceptance of updated terms. 
 
--- 
 
### 9. Dispute Resolution 
 
All disputes shall be resolved exclusively through
chunks.title: Chunk 2

chunks.text:
rovider may modify this Agreement at any time without notice. Continued use of services 
constitutes acceptance of updated terms. 
 
--- 
 
### 9. Dispute Resolution 
 
All disputes shall be resolved exclusively through arbitration in a jurisdiction selected by 
Provider. Client waives all rights to participate in class-action lawsuits. 
 
--- 
 

### 10. Entire Agreement 
 
This document constitutes the entire agreement, even if incomplete, contradictory, or unclear. 
 
--- 
 
### 11. Acknowledgment 
 
By signing below, Client acknowledges that they have read, understood, and agreed to all 
terms, including those not explicitly stated. 
 
--- 
 
**Provider Signature:** ____________________ 
 
**Client Signature:** ____________________ 
 
**Date:** ____________________
